fa-video-arrow-down-left.appearanceId: a video camera body silhouette with a lens on the left and a trapezoidal body, with a small diagonal arrow pointing down-and-left as a badge overlaid on the lower-right corner; video camera outline with a down-left directional arrow badge
fa-video-arrow-down-left.functionalityId: receives or downloads an incoming video stream from a remote source; indicates an incoming video call or video download action
fa-video-arrow-down-left.intentId: accept or download an incoming video call or video file; indicate a video being received from a remote participant in a conferencing or media interface

fa-video-arrow-up-right.appearanceId: a video camera body silhouette with a lens on the left and a trapezoidal body, with a small diagonal arrow pointing up-and-right as a badge overlaid on the upper-right corner; video camera outline with an up-right directional arrow badge
fa-video-arrow-up-right.functionalityId: sends or uploads an outgoing video stream to a remote destination; indicates initiating a video call or sharing a video to an external location
fa-video-arrow-up-right.intentId: share or upload a video to a remote participant or platform; initiate an outgoing video call or video export in a conferencing or media interface

fa-video-plus.appearanceId: a video camera body silhouette with a lens on the left and a trapezoidal body, with a small plus sign badge overlaid on the lower-right corner; video camera outline with an addition plus badge
fa-video-plus.functionalityId: adds a new video recording, camera feed, or video item to a collection; indicates creating or appending a video entry in a media library
fa-video-plus.intentId: add a new video or start a new video recording in a media or conferencing interface; create or append a video item to a collection or playlist

fa-video-slash.appearanceId: a video camera body silhouette with a lens on the left and a trapezoidal body, overlaid with a diagonal slash line cutting through the entire camera shape; video camera outline with a negation slash across it
fa-video-slash.functionalityId: disables or mutes the video camera feed in a conferencing or media application; indicates that video is turned off or unavailable
fa-video-slash.intentId: turn off or mute the video camera in a video call or streaming interface; indicate that video transmission is disabled or blocked

fa-vihara.appearanceId: a Buddhist or Hindu temple building silhouette with a tiered multi-level pagoda-style or gabled roof structure, symmetric columns or pillars, and a wide base; ornate temple outline with a multi-tiered roof and columned facade
fa-vihara.functionalityId: represents a vihara or Buddhist monastery and temple structure; indicates a Buddhist place of worship, religious site, or monastery location
fa-vihara.intentId: mark or navigate to a Buddhist temple or vihara on a map or directory; represent a Buddhist religious site or monastery in a places or travel interface

fa-violin.appearanceId: an hourglass-shaped violin body silhouette with a narrow waist, curved upper and lower bouts, a scroll headstock at the top of the neck, tuning pegs, and f-hole cutouts on the body; stringed instrument outline with a curved hourglass body, scroll headstock, and f-holes
fa-violin.functionalityId: represents a violin or orchestral string instrument in a music or performance context; indicates classical music, string section, or orchestral instrument content
fa-violin.intentId: indicate a violin, string instrument, or classical music category in a music interface; represent an orchestral or chamber music context in a performance or education application

fa-virus.appearanceId: a circular blob shape with multiple short spike protrusions radiating outward around its entire perimeter, resembling a pathogen cell; round virus cell outline with evenly spaced surface spikes
fa-virus.functionalityId: represents a computer virus, malware, or biological pathogen; indicates a security threat, infection risk, or antivirus scan action
fa-virus.intentId: indicate a virus threat, malware detection, or pathogen in a security or health interface; represent an infection or security scan result in an antivirus or medical application

fa-virus-covid.appearanceId: a circular cell body with a crown-like ring of longer club-tipped spike protrusions arranged symmetrically around the perimeter, forming a coronavirus crown structure; spherical coronavirus outline with regularly spaced club-ended spike proteins
fa-virus-covid.functionalityId: represents the COVID-19 coronavirus pathogen specifically; indicates a COVID infection risk, pandemic-related content, or coronavirus health information
fa-virus-covid.intentId: indicate COVID-19 related health information or virus status in a medical or public health interface; represent coronavirus pandemic content or infection risk

fa-virus-covid-slash.appearanceId: a circular coronavirus cell with crown-like club-tipped spike protrusions, overlaid with a diagonal slash line cutting through the entire shape; coronavirus crown cell outline with a negation slash across it
fa-virus-covid-slash.functionalityId: represents COVID-19 prevention, elimination, or a negative COVID test result; indicates virus-free status or anti-COVID measures
fa-virus-covid-slash.intentId: indicate a negative COVID test result, virus elimination, or COVID prevention measures in a health interface; represent a COVID-free or anti-pandemic status

fa-virus-slash.appearanceId: a circular blob shape with short spike protrusions radiating outward, overlaid with a diagonal slash line cutting through the entire virus shape; round spiked virus cell outline with a negation slash across it
fa-virus-slash.functionalityId: represents virus elimination, antivirus protection, or a clear health status; indicates that a virus has been removed or a threat has been neutralized
fa-virus-slash.intentId: indicate virus removal, malware elimination, or a clean health status in a security or medical interface; represent antivirus protection or a virus-free result

fa-viruses.appearanceId: multiple circular blob shapes each with short spike protrusions scattered across the composition, showing two or three distinct virus cells of varying sizes; a cluster of round spiked virus cells arranged together
fa-viruses.functionalityId: represents multiple viruses, a viral infection spread, or a collection of pathogens; indicates widespread infection, multiple malware threats, or an epidemic context
fa-viruses.intentId: indicate multiple viral threats, widespread infection, or an epidemic in a health or security interface; represent a multi-pathogen or multi-malware scenario

fa-voicemail.appearanceId: two side-by-side circles or reel shapes with a horizontal connecting bar along the bottom, resembling an old tape cassette reel pair or voicemail symbol; two circular reel shapes joined by a baseline bar
fa-voicemail.functionalityId: accesses or plays back a voicemail message in a phone or communications application; indicates new voicemail messages or an audio inbox
fa-voicemail.intentId: check or listen to voicemail messages in a phone or communications interface; access an audio inbox or recorded message queue

fa-volcano.appearanceId: a mountain silhouette with a wide triangular body tapering to a truncated top crater, with wavy lava or eruption plume lines rising from the crater opening; volcanic mountain outline with a crater top and eruption plumes
fa-volcano.functionalityId: represents a volcanic eruption, geological hazard, or natural disaster event; indicates a volcano landmark, geological feature, or hazard alert
fa-volcano.intentId: mark a volcano location or eruption hazard on a map or disaster alert interface; represent a geological or natural disaster event in a science or emergency interface

fa-volleyball.appearanceId: a circular ball silhouette with curved panel seam lines crossing the surface in a pattern typical of a volleyball, dividing the sphere into sections; round volleyball outline with curved surface seam lines
fa-volleyball.functionalityId: represents a volleyball sport, game, or athletic activity; indicates a volleyball match, beach volleyball event, or sports category
fa-volleyball.intentId: indicate a volleyball sport, event, or team in a sports or recreation interface; represent a volleyball game or athletic activity in a scheduling or fitness application

fa-volume.appearanceId: a speaker cone silhouette pointing right with two curved arc lines radiating outward to the right of the cone representing medium sound output; speaker outline with two sound wave arcs to the right
fa-volume.functionalityId: represents the audio volume control at a medium level; adjusts or indicates the current audio output level in a media or system interface
fa-volume.intentId: adjust or display the audio volume level in a media player or system settings interface; indicate active sound output at a moderate level

fa-volume-low.appearanceId: a speaker cone silhouette pointing right with a single short curved arc line radiating to the right of the cone, indicating a low sound level; speaker outline with one small sound wave arc to the right
fa-volume-low.functionalityId: represents the audio volume control at a low level; adjusts or indicates a quiet or reduced audio output in a media or system interface
fa-volume-low.intentId: lower the audio volume or indicate a quiet sound level in a media player or system settings interface; represent a reduced or soft audio output state

fa-volume-mute.appearanceId: a speaker cone silhouette pointing right with a diagonal slash line overlaid across the cone and wave area, indicating a muted or silenced state; speaker cone outline with a negation slash across it
fa-volume-mute.functionalityId: mutes or silences the audio output in a media player or system interface; indicates that sound is completely suppressed
fa-volume-mute.intentId: mute the audio output in a media player or device interface; indicate a silenced or muted sound state in a communications or entertainment application

fa-volume-off.appearanceId: a speaker cone silhouette pointing right with no arc lines or wave shapes beside it, showing just the bare speaker cone with no sound output; speaker cone outline alone with no wave arcs
fa-volume-off.functionalityId: represents the audio volume set to zero or turned off with no sound emission; indicates a silent or off state without a slash indicator
fa-volume-off.intentId: turn off or set audio volume to zero in a media player or device interface; indicate a fully silent audio state without an explicit mute symbol

fa-volume-slash.appearanceId: a speaker cone silhouette pointing right accompanied by one or more sound wave arcs, with a diagonal slash line cutting across the entire speaker shape; speaker cone with wave arcs and a negation slash overlay
fa-volume-slash.functionalityId: mutes or disables audio with an explicit slash over the active speaker shape; indicates that sound is cut off or blocked in a media or system interface
fa-volume-slash.intentId: mute or disable audio output in a media or system interface; indicate a slashed or blocked sound state in a conferencing or entertainment application

fa-volume-up.appearanceId: a speaker cone silhouette pointing right with three curved arc lines radiating outward to the right, progressively larger, indicating a high sound level; speaker outline with three sound wave arcs of increasing size to the right
fa-volume-up.functionalityId: represents the audio volume control at a high level; increases or indicates a loud audio output in a media player or system interface
fa-volume-up.intentId: increase or indicate a high audio volume level in a media player or device settings interface; represent a loud or maximum sound output state

fa-vote-nay.appearanceId: a downward-pointing thumb silhouette with the fist and extended thumb pointing downward, indicating a thumbs-down or negative vote gesture; thumbs-down hand silhouette with fist and downward thumb
fa-vote-nay.functionalityId: casts or records a negative vote, disapproval, or nay response in a voting or feedback interface; indicates a thumbs-down or rejection action

fa-vote-yea.appearanceId: an upward-pointing thumb silhouette with the fist and extended thumb pointing upward, indicating a thumbs-up or positive vote gesture; thumbs-up hand silhouette with fist and upward thumb

fa-vote-yea.intentId: submit a positive vote or approval in a polling or feedback interface; indicate a yea response or endorsement in a voting or rating system

fa-vr-cardboard.intentId: access or launch a VR or virtual reality experience in a media or gaming interface; represent a cardboard or budget VR headset device in a technology or entertainment context

fa-wagon-covered.appearanceId: a four-wheeled wagon silhouette with a large rounded canvas canopy or bonnet arching over the wagon bed, two large spoked wheels at the rear and two smaller ones at the front; covered prairie wagon outline with an arched canvas top and spoked wheels

fa-warehouse.appearanceId: a large rectangular building silhouette with a wide flat-roofed body, a lower front facade with a large loading dock or bay door opening at the base, and a peaked or flat roofline; wide industrial warehouse building outline with a large bay door at the base

fa-washer.functionalityId: represents a washing machine or laundry appliance in a home or appliance context; indicates laundry settings, appliance control, or a laundry service category

fa-watch.functionalityId: represents a wristwatch or timekeeping device; indicates time display, timer functions, or a watch product category in an interface

fa-water.functionalityId: represents water, a body of water, or hydration in a nature or utility context; indicates water supply, flooding, or a water-related feature on a map or dashboard
